name: Monster Hero Rescue City
description: Are you ready for something new like the incredible monster hero rescue city? Try using a monster superhero to save your city from the villains in the Monster Hero Rescue City game. Monster Hero Rescue Cityare is thrilling impossible adventures. Come on and use your monsters ability and game skills to fight all the gangsters in a limited time!
instructions: If you play on PC WASD click the mouse to move If you play on a mobile phone Click buttons to move
tags: 3D, Android, Battle, Boy, Boys, city, HTML5, Kids, Mobile, Monster, Rescue, Superhero
